common.terms_modal_content: By registering on ToGETHER Networking, you agree to provide accurate and up-to-date information about your organisation. You commit to using the platform only for legitimate humanitarian purposes and to respect the privacy of other members. ToGETHER Networking reserves the right to verify the information provided and to suspend any account in the event of a breach of these conditions. The data collected is used solely to facilitate humanitarian coordination in DRC.

errors.phone: Please enter a valid phone number
errors.min_select: Please select at least one option
errors.terms: Please accept the terms of use

header.title: Register your organisation
header.subtitle: Join the local humanitarian network of DRC and access funding, coordination and visibility opportunities.
header.stat1: 7 NGO members · 14 provinces · 12,780,000+ people helped · Free access

benefits.title: Why join?
benefits.b1: Access to calls for projects and grants
benefits.testimonial: Thanks to this platform, we secured €150,000 in funding in just 3 months.

step1.title: General information
step1.subtitle: Let's start with the basic information about your organisation.
step1.org_name_placeholder: e.g. Association for Social and Health Development — ADSSE
step1.org_name_helper: Enter the official name as it appears in your legal documents
step1.legal_number_helper: Number issued by the Ministry of Justice

step2.title: Organisation details
step2.subtitle: Help us better understand your mission and activities.
step2.sectors_helper: Select all sectors in which your organisation operates. Click on a sector to see the available sub-categories.
step2.zones_helper: Select your province, then the territory, then the specific health zones where you operate. You can make multiple selections at all levels.
step2.description_placeholder: Describe in 2-3 sentences the main activities of your organisation, the communities you serve and your area of action.
step2.mission_placeholder: What is the main mission of your organisation?

step3.title: Contact person
step3.subtitle: This information will be used to contact you during the verification process.
step3.name: First and last name
step3.email_helper: We will send you a confirmation email
step3.phone_helper: To contact you quickly if needed
step3.terms_after: of the ToGETHER Networking platform and certify that the information provided is accurate.
step3.data_consent: I authorise ToGETHER Networking to use my organisation's information to facilitate networking with other humanitarian actors.

success.title: Request sent successfully!
success.subtitle: Your registration request has been received. Our team will review your file and contact you within 48 hours.
success.step2_desc: You will receive an email with your access credentials
success.step3_desc: You can then log in and complete your profile

header.title: Become a strategic partner
header.subtitle: Access a network of 7 verified local NGOs active in 14 provinces of DRC. Publish your calls for projects and track the impact of your funding.
header.stat1: Access to 7 verified NGOs active in 14 provinces of DRC

benefits.title: Why become a partner?
benefits.b1: Direct access to 7 verified local NGOs
benefits.b2: Targeted publication of calls for projects
benefits.testimonial: As a donor, I was able to identify the right local partners within days.

step1.title: Organisation information
step1.subtitle: Present your organisation and its role in the humanitarian ecosystem.
step1.org_name_placeholder: e.g. Foundation for Congo Development, ECHO, AFD

step2.title: Partnership interests
step2.subtitle: Help us understand how you wish to collaborate with local NGOs.
step2.sectors_helper: Select all sectors you are interested in operating. Click on a sector to see the available sub-categories.
step2.provinces_helper: Select your province, then the territory, then the specific health zones you are interested in. You can make multiple selections at all levels.
step2.description_placeholder: Briefly describe your organisation, your mission and your experience working with local humanitarian actors in DRC or elsewhere.
step2.presentation_doc_helper: Annual report, institutional brochure, or any presentation document

step3.title: Partnership contact
step3.subtitle: Who will be the main point of contact for partnership management?
step3.name: First and last name
step3.email_helper: We will send you a confirmation email
step3.phone_helper: To contact you quickly if needed
step3.terms_after: and certify that I officially represent my organisation.
step3.data_consent: I authorise ToGETHER Networking to use my organisation's information to facilitate networking with other humanitarian actors.

success.title: Partnership request sent!
success.subtitle: Your request has been received. Our team will review your profile and contact you within 48 hours to discuss collaboration opportunities.
success.step2_desc: A member of our team will contact you
success.step3_desc: Dedicated dashboard and access to the NGO directory
